arts.ttl: Can Borussia Dortmund get their first win against Barcelona?
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund host Barcelona at the Westfalenstadion in the first-leg of the UEFA Champions League quarter-final on Wednesday night. Ranked outsiders to reach the final in Munich, last season’s runners-up…

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund XI vs Barcelona – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund travel to Barcelona tonight for the first leg of their Champions League quarter-final. The German giants reached last season’s final but have endured a challenging campaign in 2024/25. Domestically, Dortmund are eighth in the Bundesliga and facing an uphill battle to secure European football for next season. arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Borussia Dortmund – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Barcelona host Borussia Dortmund in the first leg of their Champions League quarter-final clash this evening. The Spanish side are viewed as favourites for the trophy but will not be complacent against a Dortmund side who reached last season’s final. arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund gathering pace ahead of Barcelona and Bayern Munich clashes
arts.sum: Thanks in part to Carney Chukwuemeka's debut goal, the Black-Yellows go into their season-defining matches in Barcelona and Munich as a team in form. It means that Dortmund's first two goals were created and finished by their young guns, with Adeyemi and Beier both being born in 2002 and Chukwuemeka in 2003.

arts.ttl: Raphinha's old Leeds team-mate makes feelings clear on just what Barcelona star is capable of
arts.sum: Raphinha was Pascal Struijk's team-mate at Leeds for two seasons and says he knew from their first training session together that he was quality

arts.ttl: ‘Hall of Fame’ – Barcelona newspaper celebrates Arsenal player after Real Madrid victory
arts.sum: There are a couple of main sides to the Spanish media, with the Catalan press being very much in favour of Barcelona.
